docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ECKER, MARISA AS TO DEFENDANT MIZRAHI, MIKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-20-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO BARBARA CHANG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-20-2011 AT 10:00AM.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MIZRAHI, MIKO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-29-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECKER, MARISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIZRAHI, MIKO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00, CLAIM AGAINST BARBARA CHANG IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-22-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR MIKO MIZRAHI, ADDING DEFENDANT BARBARA CHANG AND AMENDING SECTION 3B TO APRIL 2009 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ECKER, MARISA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:28.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ECKER, MARISA AS TO DEFENDANT MIZRAHI, MIKO

DECLARATION OF REQUEST TO POSTPONE DUE TO AMENDING PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ADDING A NEW DEFENDAT. PLAINTIFF IS REQUESTING SHERIFF'S OFFICE TO SERVE AND SHERIFF'S OFFICE REQUIRES 45 DAYS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ECKER, MARISA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MIZRAHI, MIKO
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "APPROVED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ECKER, MARISA
